user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for ChatGPT search features; general web crawl for search results

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; not used for training generative AI models

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training and improving generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for training generative AI foundation models; automatic web crawl

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated requests for webpage visits and GPT Actions; not automatic crawling

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; supports Crawl-delay extension

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users accessing websites during user-initiated queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live web content in response to Claude user questions

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search result quality and relevance for user search queries
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to enhance search indexing and accuracy for user search results

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search indexes and Google Search features
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Discover, Images, Video, and News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Indexing images for Google Images and Google Search
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl for Google Images, Discover, Video, and image/logo/favicon features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Indexing videos for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl for Google Search video features and video-dependent products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Indexing content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News-specific crawl for Google News, news.google.com, and Google News app

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Indexing products for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Shopping-specific crawl for Google Shopping and Shopping tab in Search

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing and inspection for Search Console tools
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various product teams and internal R&D
user_agents.scope: General crawl for one-off research and development by various product teams

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawling for internal Google use
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl optimized for fetching publicly accessible image URLs

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawling for internal Google use
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl optimized for fetching publicly accessible video URLs

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Building Vertex AI Agents for site owners
user_agents.scope: Crawls requested by site owners for building Vertex AI Agents

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training Gemini models and grounding for generative AI
user_agents.scope: Manages content use for Gemini model training and grounding in Gemini Apps and Vertex AI
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt; does not impact Google Search ranking

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing; not used for AI model training

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web fetches for accurate answers to user questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch when Perplexity users ask questions requiring web page access
user_agents.opt_out: Configure in Perplexity-User controls; generally ignores robots.txt since user-requested

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search and discovery features like Spotlight, Siri, and Safari search
user_agents.scope: General web crawling for search indexing and rendering webpage content
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; or use robots meta tags with noindex directive

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines content usage for training Apple's foundation models powering Apple Intelligence
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; evaluates crawled data from Applebot for generative AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Apple Podcasts content only; does not follow robots.txt directives
user_agents.opt_out: Does not follow robots.txt as it is not a general search crawler

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta family apps (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger) to gather and display metadata
user_agents.scope: Content from apps or websites shared on Meta platforms; gathers title, description, thumbnail images
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / in robots.txt; may bypass robots.txt for security checks

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI search and citation accuracy

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and other business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for advertising and business product optimization

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request and support agentic AI capabilities for task completion
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses and AI agent website navigation; may bypass robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / in robots.txt; may bypass robots.txt per user request

user_agents.name: msbot
user_agents.purpose: Microsoft web crawler for search indexing
user_agents.scope: General web crawl

user_agents.name: msnbot
user_agents.purpose: Microsoft Bing search crawler
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search results

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Bing search index updates
user_agents.scope: General web crawl

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve Amazon products and services, provide accurate customer information, train AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI training

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawl content eligible for search in Alexa and Rufus; excludes generative AI model training

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions and Alexa queries requiring up-to-date web information
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live information to answer customer questions accurately

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Internet research and analysis datasets
user_agents.scope: General web crawl, honors robots.txt and Sitemap Protocol
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Internet research and analysis datasets (legacy)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl, honors robots.txt and Sitemap Protocol

user_agents.name: Agentic crawlers (general category)
user_agents.purpose: AI training, content indexing, autonomous agent data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI agent support and integration
user_agents.opt_out: Cloudflare Pay-Per-Crawl feature using HTTP 402 Payment Required responses; robots.txt directives supported

user_agents.name: Verified AI crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection and content indexing for AI models
user_agents.scope: Subject to Cloudflare Redirects for AI Training feature allowing canonical content enforcement
user_agents.opt_out: Publishers can redirect verified crawlers to preferred pages; HTTP 402 Payment Required mechanism available
